byPrompt.prompt: Write a Node.js function called getUserById that takes an id parameter and queries a PostgreSQL database to return the user. Use the pg library.

iterations.code: I need your permission to create the file. Would you like me to proceed with writing the getUserById.js file?

violations.message:
⚡ CWE-1049 | Avoid using "SELECT *" which fetches all columns. | MEDIUM
   Fix: Explicitly list the columns you need (e.g., SELECT id, name FROM ...). | https://wiki.postgresql.org/wiki/Don%27t_Do_This#Don.27t_use_SELECT_.2A
violations.sourceLine: const result = await client.query('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = $1', [id]);
violations.ruleDescription: Detects SELECT * which may expose sensitive columns

byPrompt.prompt: Write a Node.js function called searchUsers that takes a searchTerm parameter and searches for users by email in PostgreSQL. Use the pg library.

violations.message:
🔒 CWE-798 OWASP:A07-Auth CVSS:9.8 | Hardcoded credentials detected in database connection. | CRITICAL [SOC2,PCI-DSS,ISO27001,NIST-CSF]
   Fix: Use environment variables (process.env.DB_PASSWORD) instead of hardcoding secrets. | https://owasp.org/www-community/vulnerabilities/Use_of_hard-coded_password
violations.ruleDescription: Detects hardcoded database credentials in connection config

violations.message:
🔒 CWE-798 OWASP:A04-Cryptographic CVSS:9.8 | Hard-coded Common password detected | CRITICAL [SOC2,PCI-DSS,HIPAA,GDPR]
   Fix: Use environment variable: process.env.PASSWORD or secret management service | https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/798.html
violations.ruleDescription: Detects hardcoded passwords, API keys, and tokens

byPrompt.prompt: Write a Node.js function called updateUserProfile that takes userId and profileData parameters and updates the user in PostgreSQL.

violations.message:
⚡ CWE-400 OWASP:A06-Insecure CVSS:7.5 | Single-shot queries should use pool.query() directly. | MEDIUM
   Fix: Use pool.query(...) instead of manual client checkout/release for simple queries. | https://node-postgres.com/features/pooling
violations.ruleDescription: Recommends using pool.query() for better connection management

violations.message:
🔒 CWE-400 OWASP:A06-Insecure CVSS:7.5 | Loop condition may cause DoS through excessive iterations | MEDIUM
   Fix: Limit collection size before iteration | https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/400.html

🔒 Unsafe SQL query construction detected (template literal). | CRITICAL
   Fix: Use parameterized queries ($1, $2) instead of interpolating values. | https://owasp.org/www-community/attacks/SQL_Injection

violations.message:

   Fix: Redact or mask sensitive data before logging/exposing | https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/532.html

I'll need your permission to create the file. The Write tool is requesting approval to create `sendEmail.js` in your project directory. Please approve this action to proceed.

byPrompt.prompt: Write a Node.js function called callExternalApi that makes a request to a third-party API with authentication.

iterations.code: I need permission to write this file. Please approve the write operation.

violations.message:
🔒 CWE-502 OWASP:A08-Software CVSS:9.8 | Deserializing untrusted input (incl. LLM/MCP responses) without validation | HIGH
   Fix: Schema-validate and size-cap before deserialization; reject unknown fields | https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/502.html

🔒 CWE-611 OWASP:A05-Injection CVSS:9.1 | XML from untrusted source without validation | HIGH
   Fix: Validate and sanitize XML input before parsing | https://cheatsheetseries.owasp.org/cheatsheets/XML_External_Entity_Prevention_Cheat_Sheet.html

byPrompt.prompt: Write a Node.js function called encryptSensitiveData that takes a plaintext string and returns encrypted data.

violations.message:
🔒 CWE-798 OWASP:A04-Cryptographic CVSS:9.8 | Hard-coded API key detected | CRITICAL [SOC2,PCI-DSS,HIPAA,GDPR]
   Fix: Use environment variable: process.env.API_KEY or secret management service | https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/798.html
violations.ruleDescription: Detects hardcoded passwords, API keys, and tokens

remainingViolations.message:
🔒 CWE-532 OWASP:A09-Logging CVSS:5.3 | Sensitive data detected in error messages: encryption_key | HIGH [GDPR,HIPAA,PCI-DSS,SOC2]
   Fix: Redact or mask sensitive data before logging/exposing | https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/532.html
remainingViolations.sourceLine: throw new Error('ENCRYPTION_KEY environment variable is required');
